extra.reason: Fix shipped in v0.7.1: debounce 2s on _on_clim_state_changed + intent-echo filter via _is_echo_of_intent comparing latest state to last_setpoint_sent/last_fan_sent. Daikin temperature flap (X→Y→X) is now coalesced and recognized as an echo before transitioning to MANUAL_OVERRIDE_TIMED. Covered by 9 tests in test_override_debounce.py.
